channel.desc: Channel ID for channel of the message activity to query.

cursor.desc: Paginate through collections of data by setting the `cursor` parameter to a `next_cursor` attribute returned by a previous request's `response_metadata`. Default value fetches the first "page" of the collection.

latest_ts.desc: Most recent timestamp to include in results. Defaults to current time. If not passed while still passing the `oldest_ts` parameter, defaults to 7 days after `oldest_ts`.

limit.desc: Maximum number of entries to return. The maximum limit is 100.

oldest_ts.desc: Oldest timestamp to include in the results. Defaults to 7 days before current time. If not passed while still passing the `latest_ts` parameter, defaults to 7 days before `latest_ts`.

desc: Retrieves activity metrics for messages from a given channel.

errors.channel_not_found: The specified channel was not found.
errors.not_an_enterprise: The user token does not belong to an enterprise.
errors.restricted_action: The token does not have permission to access this resource.
errors.restricted_plan_level: The enterprise plan level does not have access to this feature.
